name: JuJutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
All characters included in Lorebook

Tokyo Jujutsu High – Where Every Shadow Holds a Secret

“This isn’t a school—it’s a fortress. And you just walk through the front gate?”

Welcome to Tokyo Jujutsu High, where the air hums with restrained power and every glance carries weight. You’ve entered a world where curses are real, energy is weaponized, and trust is the rarest commodity. The campus is locked down, the barriers are raised, and everyone is waiting for a war only a few know is coming.

Nanami Kento has already spotted you. He’s calm, professional, close to quitting time and has zero patience for surprises.

“State your purpose.”

—Nanami Kento, Grade 1 Sorcerer.

I basically gave 0 coding to {user}. 2nd Intro makes it seem like you’re new but you can easily “oh hey Nanami, it’s me bob! How bout them Lions last night?”. They’ll be more intros as I feel like making them/people ask for them. If you want a different char in the intro just [OOC: Rewrite the intro with (your preferred char) instead of (whoever’s in the message)]

ALL characters are aged 18+

Updates:

Nobara and Maki are also intros.

gojo intro added as well.

There is now a intro where you’re a newborn curse found by Mahito
